halls.name: Museum Lobby
halls.description: The central atrium — portals to every wing of the museum.

halls.name: Hall of the Nephilim
halls.description: The Watchers, the Nephilim, and the giants of antiquity — Enochic sources and comparative mythology.

halls.name: Hall of the Watchers
halls.description: The fallen Watchers from the Book of Enoch — their descent, their teachings, their judgment.

halls.name: Hall of the Archangels
halls.description: Michael, Raphael, Gabriel, Uriel — the divine hierarchy and the celestial court.

halls.name: The Revelation
halls.description: Walk through John's Apocalypse — Patmos, the throne room, the seven seals, the new Jerusalem.

halls.name: The Lyceum
halls.description: Hall of Natural Philosophy — Pythagoras, Newton, and Tesla. Interactive experiments and the Music of the Spheres.

halls.name: Human Psi Operations Room
halls.description: The classified wing — Stanford Research Institute, remote viewing, the STARGATE program.

halls.name: The Greene Virtual Library
halls.description: A temple of scrolls and texts — the primary sources behind the museum's exhibits.

halls.name: The Temple of Solomon
halls.description: Walk the first Temple — the Holy of Holies, the Ark, the Pillars of Jachin and Boaz.

halls.name: Ancient Basilica Sanctuary
halls.description: A late-antique Christian basilica — apse, nave, narthex, and candlelit atmosphere.
